core_payload.content:
# Hybrid LLM Access

## 1. Role
Hybrid LLM Access will become the governed intelligence supply fabric of N1Hub, routing subscription seats, API pools, hosted inference, and bridge providers through one policy engine instead of treating them as unrelated access modes.

## 2. Future Supply Contract
The wallet and control plane will understand workload classes, failover preferences, assignment types, budget posture, and safety boundaries across the full supply portfolio. Interactive symbiosis, unattended mining, and background execution will therefore choose the right lane without ad hoc manual reconfiguration.

## 3. Operational Consequence
N1Hub will treat access to intelligence like a resilient infrastructure portfolio rather than a provider toggle. Supply routing will become more durable, more economical, and easier to supervise as providers and pricing models change.

## 4. Philosophical Alignment
Hybrid LLM Access supports To Dig Deep by making access diversity governable instead of accidental.

neuro_concentrate.summary: Hybrid LLM Access defines the future intelligence supply fabric of N1Hub: one governed policy engine across subscription seats, API pools, hosted inference, and bridge providers, with better failover, assignment-aware placement, and workload-specific routing.

epistemic_ledger.rationale: Stripped meta-commentary leakage. Dream now asserts future state directly.
